instruction.result_request_rationale: User explicitly requests a load change ('Reduziere Last B um 3 MW') without mentioning any specific result metric. The '3 MW' refers to the action magnitude, not a requested result. Following the example pattern, this triggers default_voltage mode with no requested metrics.

tool_spec.name: interpret_instruction
tool_spec.description: Interpret a natural-language user request into a structured load-change instruction.

instruction.result_request_rationale: User explicitly requests a load change ('Reduziere Last B um 3 MW') without mentioning any specific result metric. The '3 MW' refers to the action magnitude, not a requested result. Following the example pattern, this triggers default_voltage mode with no requested metrics.

tool_spec.name: resolve_load
tool_spec.description: Resolve the target load object inside the active PowerFactory project.

instruction.result_request_rationale: User explicitly requests a load change ('Reduziere Last B um 3 MW') without mentioning any specific result metric. The '3 MW' refers to the action magnitude, not a requested result. Following the example pattern, this triggers default_voltage mode with no requested metrics.

tool_spec.name: execute_change_load
tool_spec.description: Apply a load change in PowerFactory and run load flow before/after.

instruction.result_request_rationale: User explicitly requests a load change ('Reduziere Last B um 3 MW') without mentioning any specific result metric. The '3 MW' refers to the action magnitude, not a requested result. Following the example pattern, this triggers default_voltage mode with no requested metrics.
Empty user input, falling back to default voltage.

tool_spec.name: summarize_powerfactory_result
tool_spec.description: Summarize result data from a PowerFactory load workflow for the end user.
